candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and best semantic match for total revenue/sales.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Short-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not reported revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the reported revenue line; did not use 'Total revenue and other operating income' because it includes other operating income and REVT should be top-line revenue.

candidates.why: Exact match to COGS/cost of sales.

variables.notes: Exact COGS label present; preview emptiness does not disqualify it.

candidates.why: Personnel/overhead expense component and strong SG&A candidate.
Operating overhead bucket; suitable SG&A component when D&A is separately disclosed.
Explicit selling expense and strong SG&A component.
Broad subtotal that likely includes D&A and possibly COGS; less preferred than components.
R&D line exists only as supplemental and below EBIT; not appropriate for SG&A here under the below-EBIT rule.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A total row. Chose overhead components and excluded 'Operating expenses' because it is a broader subtotal and likely includes D&A. Excluded lease, legal, bad debt, remaining, and depreciation/amortization rows to avoid mixing in non-core, residual, or D&A items.

candidates.why: R&D-related but amortization, not current-period R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D expense label; although supplemental and below EBIT, it is the best available R&D expense row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D, not current R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Used the dedicated R&D expense line. It appears in the supplemental section below EBIT, so it is not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS per the below-EBIT rule.

candidates.why: Broad total that includes FX loss and other items; less preferred than granular recurring components.
Direct interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease interest component.
Recurring finance-cost bucket and preferable to broad financial expenses total when selected with interest components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Duplicate supplemental presentation of lease interest; avoid double counting with the main line.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
Liability balance, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded 'Financial expenses' because it appears to include foreign exchange loss. Excluded the supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Subcomponent of equity, not total book equity.
Best available total equity/book equity line on the balance sheet.
Duplicate capitalization variant of the same total equity concept.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners equity line or non-controlling interest line is present on the balance sheet, so used total equity for BE and leave MIB empty to avoid double counting.
